comment: Cron jobs (pg_cron) do VetFlow. {{LOG}} = tabela de log, {{PREFIX}} = prefixo.

jobs.name: heartbeat
jobs.description: heartbeat de saúde do projeto a cada 6h

jobs.name: trial_sweep
jobs.description: marca trials expirados como past_due (acesso reduzido ao Inicial)
jobs.sql: update public.app_subscriptions set status = 'past_due', updated_at = now() where status = 'trialing' and plan_slug = 'inicial' and current_period_end is not null and current_period_end < now(); update public.profiles set plan_slug = 'inicial' where trial_ends_at is not null and trial_ends_at < now() and plan_slug = 'inicial'; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (2, '{{PREFIX}}trial_sweep', 'trials expirados reduzidos')

jobs.name: events_prune
jobs.description: remove eventos de pagamento com mais de 180 dias
jobs.sql: delete from public.app_payment_events where created_at < now() - interval '180 days'; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (3, '{{PREFIX}}events_prune', 'eventos antigos removidos')

jobs.name: appointments_reminder_rollup
jobs.description: registra quantas consultas estão agendadas para as próximas 24h (base de lembretes)
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) select 4, '{{PREFIX}}appointments_reminder_rollup', 'consultas próximas 24h: ' || count(*) from public.appointments where scheduled_at between now() and now() + interval '24 hours' and status in ('agendada','confirmada')
